description_long: This chest of drawers features a highly stylized, wavy exterior with a dark wood finish, giving it a unique, almost organic appearance. The front face displays six drawers arranged in two columns, each fitted with a small, round, gold-colored knob. The sides and top are undulating and irregular, lacking any straight lines or sharp corners, which adds to its sculptural quality. The back is smooth and unadorned, matching the dark wood texture seen throughout the piece. The drawers are slightly misaligned, enhancing the whimsical, hand-crafted aesthetic. This piece would stand out in an urban environment, such as a boutique, gallery, or eclectic apartment.
description: A dark, wavy wooden chest of drawers with six gold-knobbed drawers and an organic, sculptural form.
description_view_0: Front view showing six drawers with gold knobs and the wavy, irregular surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the undulating, sculpted profile with only the knobs of the drawers visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, continuous dark wood surface with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wavy profile and the protruding drawer knobs.
